diagrams.title: 5-Stage RISC Pipeline Timing Diagram
diagrams.description: Timing diagram showing overlapping execution of 5 instructions in a 5-stage pipeline. Each row represents an instruction, columns represent clock cycles. Demonstrates pipeline filling, steady-state throughput, and draining phases.
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how instructions overlap execution and understand why throughput stabilizes at 1 instruction per cycle after pipeline fills. Shows the 'diagonal' pattern of pipeline execution.

diagrams.title: Single-Cycle Datapath Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Block diagram showing major components of a simple processor datapath: PC, MAR, MDR, IR, Register File, ALU, Control Unit, and data/control signal paths between them.
diagrams.purpose: Understand the data flow between components during instruction execution. Shows where data travels and how control signals direct the datapath operations.

diagrams.title: Pipeline Hazard Classification
diagrams.description: Classification tree showing three pipeline hazards with definitions and examples. Shows structural, data (RAW/WAR/WAW), and control hazards with causes and resolution methods.
elements: Data hazard - RAW, WAR, WAW dependencies
diagrams.purpose: Categorize and understand different hazard types, their causes in pipeline execution, and appropriate mitigation strategies for each type.
